message:
feat: Implement real set, frozenset, deque types and fix placeholder implementations

- Add PySetObject, PyFrozenSetObject, PyDequeObject types to runtime.zig
- Add PySet_Type, PyFrozenSet_Type, PyDeque_Type type objects
- Add type checking functions: PySet_Check, PyFrozenSet_Check, PyAnySet_Check, PyDeque_Check
- Implement full PySet in Objects/setobject.zig with hash table, add, contains, discard, pop, clear
- Implement full PyDeque in Objects/dequeobject.zig with block-based storage, append/pop both ends, rotate
- Update builtins.zig set(), frozenset(), deque() constructors to use real implementations
- Fix BaseExceptionGroup and ExceptionGroup subgroup/split to actually filter exceptions by type
- Fix ast_executor executeBinOp to support both int and float operations with proper type promotion
- Fix ast_executor lookupBuiltin to return proper Py_None singleton
- Fix ast_executor executeCall len() to use proper type checking for string, list, tuple, dict
- Fix signal.raise() to use actual OS std.posix.raise() for default handler
- Fix glob.iglob() to implement proper ** recursive directory matching

All changes replace placeholder implementations with real, working code.
